title: clinopodium chinense subsp. glabrescens
intro: Clinopodium chinense subsp. glabrescens, also known as Chinese clinopodium, is a subspecies of the Clinopodium chinense plant, which is a type of perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Clinopodium chinense subsp. glabrescens include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and soothing respiratory problems, such as coughs and bronchitis. It can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote overall well-being and prevent illnesses.
